name: Creamy Lemon Chicken Breasts

ingredients.item: cornstarch or flour dissolved in 2 T cold water

method: Wash and pat chicken dry. Flour each chicken breast on both sides. Sprinkle salt and pepper to season. In a large frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil and fry floured chicken breasts until browned on both sizes and white in the middle. Remove and set aside to drain on a paper towl. In the same pan, add 1 cup of cream, 2 T fresh lemon juice and zest, and one pat of butter, salt, and pepper. Stir until thickened. You can add a little flour or cornstarch dissolved in water to thicken the sauce. At the very end, mince a clove of garlic, saute for a minute. Add chicken to cream and heat through, coating chicken with lemon cream sauce. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Garnish with parsley and lemon slices. This is usually made as a second course in Italy. If you add a side dish like potatoes you can have this as a first course as well. Did you know that in Italy they eat salad last? They do that in many parts of Europe and it was something I had to get used to. Serves 2-3. Olé
